nasb.text: “Son of man, has not the house of Israel, the rebellious house, said to you, ‘What are you doing?’

esv.text: “Son of man, has not the house of Israel, the rebellious house, said to you, ‘What are you doing?’

cnv.text: “人子啊！以色列家，就是叛逆的民族，不是問你：‘你在作甚麼呢？’

ccb.text: “人子啊，那些叛逆的以色列人不是问你在做什么吗？
